ab: tilha muntal iaku naak a apuki’ay musui farifariwan pashatalha sa aniamin, kathun apuki’ay manasha mat’anak malhuyza wa shanglaw mu’iutu, numa kmalawa miniahala inai a thau maqitan a akaanin lhai pashta.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: pashtay miku apuki’ay a pashatalha’an, makamun numa lhari manasha sa thau finariw, manasha sa thau munai kmaan pintatan thithu a pania’an.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和芋頭很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and taro, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: thithu sa pintatan a tazakas numa sunda wa afu mathuaw maqitan ya kaanin, numa ianan pasain rafun masa rumrum puqana’an, shmurawath shazik manasha sa kilhnaqualh a thau, pashta mulhthkiz munai naam a pashatalha’an mududur.
ch: 她煮的蕨菜和糯米飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的馬告滷肉，味道吸引了很多遊客，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
en: The ferns and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: apuki’ay ya pintata sa aniamin, ishirshir iaku malalawa kilhnaqulh a thau. ishirshir minbabaw iaku mzai az’az mat’anak iamin malhuiza wa shanglaw, min’ananak maqitan, uhiawan munai fariw!
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, \"The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!\"

ab: naam a aniamin muhiaw fariwiniza, apuki’ay mzai, “maqa ianan ihu tu mindahip.”
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, \"It’s all thanks to your help.\"

ab: izai a makakakri, mafazaq iaku sa izai miniahala inai a thau a pinalhuiza numa kakaanin a infazaqin, numa ananak shmuzap pashatalha sa aniamin a shkuda.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: mriqaz naak a apuki’ay mathuaw miku sa kahiwan a kakaanin, mathuaw iaku pazazai numa matingqaran.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常驕傲和高興。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
